query: Could you devise a 7-day travel plan for two people, starting in Las Vegas and touring 3 cities in Idaho from March 4th to March 10th, 2022? Our budget is set at $5,100. We require accommodations that allow smoking and should ideally be entire rooms. We would prefer to avoid any flights for our transportation.

plan.transportation: self-driving, from Las Vegas to Twin Falls, duration: 7 hours 32 mins, distance: 796 km, cost: 39

plan.attraction: Snake River Canyon Rim Trail;Shoshone Falls Park;Evel Knievel Snake River Canyon Jump Site;
plan.accommodation: 2 Bed Private Entrance Williamsburg  289.0 Entire home/apt                        No smoking & No parties             1.0                  3                 1.0 Twin Falls

plan.transportation: self-driving, from Twin Falls to Pocatello, duration: 1 hour 46 mins, distance: 183 km, cost: 9

plan.attraction: Idaho Museum of Natural History;Museum of Clean;Zoo Idaho;
plan.dinner: 650 - The Global Kitchen;The Baking Treats N More;
plan.accommodation: Stunning 1-Bedroom NYC Apartment on the River!   68.0 Entire home/apt              No children under 10            30.0                  3                 2.0 Pocatello

plan.transportation: self-driving, from Pocatello to Boise, duration: 3 hours 23 mins, distance: 377 km, cost: 18

plan.attraction: Zoo Boise;Julia Davis Park;Boise Art Museum;
plan.accommodation: Private Studio Apartment in Bushwick  160.0 Entire home/apt               No children under 10 & No smoking             2.0                  2                 3.0 Boise
